ops.text: The PostToolUse commit hook suggested capturing a durable note titled "Added SerpAPI as fallback flight search backend" after a commit that declared the cc-present plugin dependency and synced the program count — nothing SerpAPI-related in the diff. The hook apparently summarized the primary workspace's dirty working copy (another session's in-flight cli/getaway/bridge.py work) instead of the commit it fired on; commits made from a secondary jj workspace seem to confuse its diff source. Skipped the note to avoid fabricating a durable fact; the hook should derive its summary from the committed change ids, not the primary checkout's @.
